name: xray_denoise_tool
description: Chest X-ray denoising via TorchXRayVision's ResNetAE (31.1 M params, pretrained on PadChest + NIH + CheXpert + MIMIC). SharpXR preferred when user-supplied weights exist; Fast-DDPM LDFDCT as final fallback.

help.summary: Denoise a chest X-ray via SharpXR (MICCAI 2025 MIRASOL). Graceful fallback to Fast-DDPM when SharpXR weights are not available.
